picks.title: VP of Strategic Partnerships
picks.snippet: Reporting to the CRO and partnering with Legal, Compliance, Implementation, Product & Engineering the VP of Strategic Partnerships will own the development and execution of a comprehensive partnership strategy. Experience in the Employee Benefits ecosystem strongly preferred.

picks.title: Head of Revenue Operations (Director or VP)
picks.snippet: Work with sales leadership and executive team to achieve growth goals, own territory management and forecasting

picks.title: Partner Success Director
picks.snippet: Equifax is seeking a Partner Success Director to join our Sales UK Business Unit and Strategic Alliances & Partnerships team. This senior leadership role is responsible for driving sustainable growth and innovation through existing strategic partnerships.
